name: firstline-chars-supersedes-firstline
description: firstLineChars supersedes firstLine, hangingChars supersedes hanging
expected_behavior: P0: firstLineChars=200 supersedes firstLine=360 (both preserved). P1: hangingChars=100 supersedes hanging=720 (both preserved). P2: firstLine=360 only. P3: firstLineChars=200 only.
